post.text_content:
🚀 We're Hiring: Email Marketing Executive
🏢 AstoundEdge - Empowering Businesses with Smart IT Solutions
📍 Noida Sector 63
💼 Experience: 1–4 Years
We are looking for a result-driven Email Marketing Executive with hands-on experience in lead generation for IT Services (Website Development & SEO).
Key Responsibilities:

🔹 Plan and execute email marketing campaigns
🔹 Generate quality leads for Website Development & SEO services
🔹 Work with email marketing tools and platforms
🔹 Build and manage verified email databases for lead generation
🕒 Office Timing: 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM
🏢 Work Mode: Work from Office (WFO)
📩 Share your resume at: nandini.r@astoundede.com
References are highly appreciated.

post.text_content:
WE ARE HIRING || Baniwal Infotech || E-Mail Marketing Specialist || Noida-62

Role: E-Mail Marketing Specialist (1-5yr experience)
Location: Noida-62 (5 Days- Full time)

Requirement (E-Mail Marketing Specialist)-
- Proven experience in manual lead generation and prospect research.
- Hands-on experience in identifying and collecting client email addresses from various online platforms.
- Proficiency in managing and using multiple professional email accounts (e.g., Outlook and other business email platforms)
- Prior experience generating qualified leads for SEO, Digital Marketing, IT Services, or related technology domains.
- Strong understanding of lead generation strategies, prospect identification, and database management.
- Experience in client handling, including professional communication and relationship management.

Those who're interested for these roles, Kindly share their updated CV on the email id- hr@baniwalinfotech.com

post.text_content:
🚀 We're Hiring | Email Marketing Specialist

Do you know how to turn emails into engagement, leads, and conversions? If you're passionate about Email Marketing and Marketing Automation, we'd love to have you on our team!

📍 Location: Agra | Noida | Lucknow | Varanasi (Work from Office)
 💼 Experience: 2+ Years

🎯 You're a Great Fit If You:
✅ Have hands-on experience with Mailchimp, HubSpot, Klaviyo, ActiveCampaign, or similar platforms.
 ✅ Can create, manage, and optimize Email Campaigns & Automation Workflows.
 ✅ Have strong knowledge of Audience Segmentation, A/B Testing & Email Analytics.
 ✅ Can improve Open Rates, CTR & Campaign Performance.
 ✅ Have a creative, analytical, and result-driven mindset.

🌟 Why Join?
💰 Attractive Salary + Performance Incentives
 📈 Fast Career Growth Opportunities
 🌎 Work with National & International Clients
 🎓 Learning & Upskilling Opportunities
 🤝 Collaborative & Growth-Focused Work Culture

📩 Apply Now

📧 meer.alam@tekinspirations.com
📞 +91 9557710070

💬 Comment "Email Marketing" or send your resume via DM.

⚡ Immediate Joiners Preferred!

Know someone who's a great fit? Tag them below or share this opportunity with your network! 🚀
